seo.title: Contact HeartLink | Private Enquiries
seo.description: Contact HeartLink for family, applicant, matchmaker and partnership enquiries.

hero.title: Speak with us privately.
hero.description: Have a question before submitting a profile? Send a short enquiry and the right person will respond.

whatsappSection.title: Prefer to speak first?
whatsappSection.description: Families can also message or call HeartLink privately before completing the full application.

form.title: How can we help?
form.introduction: Share your details and we will get back to you privately.
form.consent: I consent to HeartLink using these details to respond to my enquiry.
